retrieval_protocol.rule: Open Authority before implementation when semantics or thresholds are unclear.
Resolve the lane first, then open concrete files inside that lane.
After reading implementation, confirm behavior via tests or latest status artifacts.
Use this passive graph as the first recovery surface before considering a graph database.

lanes.summary: Deliberation, gate decisions, and route governance.

lanes.summary: Semantic graph, crystallization, SoulDB, and boot-time recall.

lanes.label: Evolution Plane

lanes.label: Web Surface
lanes.summary: Front-end transport, fallback, and soul-model rendering helpers.

lanes.label: Verification
lanes.summary: Tests and current status surfaces that prove the graph against reality.

lanes.label: Observability
lanes.summary: Machine snapshots and passive artifacts that help later agents recover state.
